name: ADVENT Trooper
description: Standard ADVENT infantry. Low threat individually but dangerous in groups.

abilities.name: Suppressive Fire
abilities.description: Pin down an XCOM soldier, reducing their aim.

counterTip: Easy to kill. Flank for free crits or use grenades to destroy their cover.

name: ADVENT Officer
description: ADVENT squad leader. Buffs nearby troops and calls in reinforcements.

abilities.name: Mark Target
abilities.description: All ADVENT allies gain +15 aim against the marked XCOM soldier.

abilities.name: Summon Reinforcements
abilities.description: Calls in a reinforcement pod when the squad is revealed.

counterTip: Priority target. Kill the Officer first to prevent reinforcements and remove the aim buff.

name: ADVENT Stun Lancer
description: Close-range ADVENT unit armed with an electric lance. Dangerous in melee.

abilities.name: Arc Wave
abilities.description: Stuns nearby XCOM soldiers. Can hit multiple targets.

abilities.name: Lancer Charge
abilities.description: Dashes toward a soldier and deals melee damage, applying Stun.

counterTip: Keep your soldiers spread out. Kill before it closes to melee range. Bladestorm Rangers can punish their dash.

name: ADVENT Shieldbearer
description: Support unit that projects energy shields to protect nearby ADVENT troops.

abilities.name: Energy Shield
abilities.description: Grants +2 HP shield to all nearby ADVENT allies until they are hit.

counterTip: Top priority — their shield makes every other enemy tankier. Kill or hack first. Hack rewards are often great.

name: ADVENT MEC
description: Mechanized ADVENT trooper. High HP and armor. Slow but devastating.

abilities.name: Minigun
abilities.description: Fires multiple shots in a cone, hitting all in range.

abilities.name: Explode on Death
abilities.description: Detonates when killed, dealing AoE damage.

counterTip: Use Shredder (Grenadier) to reduce armor first. Explosives and flanking shots work well.

name: Sectoid
description: Alien psionic unit. Can reanimate fallen soldiers and panic or mind control your troops.

abilities.name: Mindspin
abilities.description: Inflicts Panic on a soldier. Panicked soldiers fire randomly.

abilities.name: Psionic Reanimate
abilities.description: Reanimates a fallen human corpse as a zombie under Sectoid control.

abilities.name: Mind Control
abilities.description: Takes full control of a soldier (higher-tier Sectoids only).

counterTip: Kill priority. Their psionics ignore cover. Any reanimated zombies die when the Sectoid dies. Psi Operative Solace aura protects nearby soldiers.

name: Viper
description: Alien serpentine unit. Can grab and squeeze soldiers, removing them from play until rescued.

abilities.name: Bind
abilities.description: Grabs an adjacent soldier and begins crushing them each turn. Bound soldier cannot act.

abilities.name: Tongue Pull
abilities.description: Pulls a distant soldier adjacent to the Viper. Does not end turn.

abilities.name: Poison Spit
abilities.description: AoE poisonous cloud. Slows and damages all caught in it.

counterTip: Kill immediately if it binds a soldier. Bladestorm Rangers can punish the tongue pull. Keep spacing tight to avoid tongue pulls isolating soldiers.

name: Muton
description: Aggressive alien heavy trooper. High HP, grenade throwers, melee counter-attack.

abilities.name: Bloodlust
abilities.description: Counter-attacks any soldier that misses a melee attack against them.

abilities.name: Battle Frenzy
abilities.description: Gains +1 action after a nearby Muton is killed.

abilities.name: Alien Grenade
abilities.description: Throws a large-radius grenade that destroys cover.

counterTip: Never melee them — they counter. Use grenades to break cover then shoot. Shredder Cannon to strip armor.

name: Berserker
description: Massive, enraged alien brawler. Charges toward your soldiers and attacks any adjacent unit.

abilities.name: Rampage
abilities.description: When damaged, the Berserker immediately moves toward the attacker and attacks if adjacent.

abilities.name: Charge
abilities.description: Closes distance quickly and attacks.

abilities.name: Enrage
abilities.description: When near death, gains additional actions.

counterTip: Use elevation and distance. Shoot-and-scoot tactics. Never let it reach melee range. Stasis a damaged Berserker before it rampages. Bluescreen bombs work on nothing here — use AP rounds or explosives.

name: Archon
description: Alien flying warrior priest. High mobility and devastating melee attack. Replaces Floaters from XCOM 1.

abilities.name: Blazing Pinions
abilities.description: Winds up for one turn then fires a powerful ranged barrage at a soldier.

abilities.name: Fly
abilities.description: Can freely fly, taking high-ground advantage and moving over obstacles.

counterTip: Interrupt Blazing Pinions if possible (WotC Skirmisher). Otherwise kill it before it fires. Elevation doesn't help you against a flier.

name: Andromedon
description: Alien inside an armored suit. When the suit is destroyed, the pilot emerges and self-destructs.

abilities.name: Acid Trail
abilities.description: Leaves a trail of acid that damages soldiers and destroys cover.

abilities.name: Rebirth
abilities.description: When the suit is destroyed, the biological alien pilot emerges and continues fighting.

counterTip: After killing the suit, finish the pilot immediately or it will explode. Plasma weapons or armor shredding reduces time to kill. Don't cluster — acid trail is nasty.

name: Faceless
description: Shapeshifting alien that disguises itself as a civilian. Reveals and transforms when near XCOM soldiers.

abilities.name: Mimic
abilities.description: Appears as a harmless civilian until adjacent to an XCOM soldier or attacked.

abilities.name: Rend
abilities.description: Heavy melee attack after transforming.

counterTip: Scan with Specialist before civilians get close. They're vulnerable right after transforming. ADVENT Stasis also reveals them.

name: Chryssalid
description: Fast melee alien that implants eggs in killed humans. Infested victims rise as Chryssalid zombies.

abilities.name: Cocoon
abilities.description: A civilian or killed soldier killed by a Chryssalid becomes a cocoon that hatches 3 Chryssalids.

abilities.name: Charge
abilities.description: Very high mobility — can close gaps in one move.

counterTip: Never let them reach your soldiers. Use explosives proactively. If a civilian is infected, kill the cocoon before it hatches. Suppress or stasis buys time.

name: Codex
description: Psionic alien information broker. Splits when damaged and disrupts your soldiers' weapons.

abilities.name: Cypher
abilities.description: Disables the weapons of XCOM soldiers in range for 1 turn.

abilities.name: Clone
abilities.description: When damaged but not killed, creates a copy of itself.

abilities.name: Psionic Rift
abilities.description: Deals psionic damage in an area.

counterTip: Use Bluescreen bombs or hacking to disable it. Kill in one activation if possible to prevent cloning. Psi Op Stasis stops it from cloning.

name: Gatekeeper
description: Massive alien sphere. Can open to reveal powerful psionic abilities and summon Sectoids.

abilities.name: Soul Harvest
abilities.description: In open state, drains life from all XCOM soldiers in range.

abilities.name: Closed Sphere
abilities.description: In closed state, +4 armor but limited abilities. Must open to use psionics.

abilities.name: Summon Sectoids
abilities.description: Can reanimate fallen units in its vicinity.

counterTip: Focus fire while it's in open state — its armor is reduced. Explosives shred its armor. Bluescreen bombs deal bonus damage. Rush it before it can summon.

name: Sectopod
description: Massive alien walker. The most powerful non-boss enemy. Extremely high HP and armor, devastating weapons.

abilities.name: Stomp
abilities.description: Destroys cover and deals massive AoE damage to adjacent soldiers.

abilities.name: Overwatch Stance
abilities.description: Enters overwatch — fires at every soldier who moves in range.

abilities.name: Lightning Field
abilities.description: Electrifies the immediate area, damaging and stunning adjacents.

counterTip: Hack it if possible (big Gremlin bonus, Specialist is great here). Otherwise: Bluescreen bombs, stasis, max explosives, then focus fire. Do not let it move into your squad — its stomp is devastating.

name: Avatar
description: The Elders' physical form. One of the strongest enemies in the game. High psi powers, can revive nearby aliens.

abilities.name: Psionic Storm
abilities.description: Massive area psionic attack damaging and panicking XCOM soldiers.

abilities.name: Sustain
abilities.description: Can automatically survive a lethal hit with 1 HP (once).

abilities.name: Revive Alien
abilities.description: Revive a fallen alien unit.

abilities.name: Mind Control
abilities.description: Takes full control of a soldier.

counterTip: Bring your best psionics (Domination, Stasis). Kill as fast as possible before Sustain triggers. Flashbangs/Disorientation stops most psi abilities.

name: Viper King
description: Alien Ruler — a supercharged Viper that reacts to every XCOM action with its own reaction. Massive health pool.
rulerReactionNote: After each XCOM action (not just turn), the Viper King takes a free reaction action: move, attack, bind, or flee. Use Ruler Reaction items (e.g., Hunter's Axe) to stun it and prevent reactions.

abilities.name: Freeze Breath
abilities.description: Freezes all soldiers in a wide cone for 1-2 turns.

abilities.name: Bind
abilities.description: Grabs and crushes a soldier every turn until freed.

abilities.name: Tongue Pull
abilities.description: Pulls a distant soldier adjacent.

abilities.name: Ruler Reaction
abilities.description: Reacts after each XCOM action — not just on its turn.

counterTip: Equip the Hunter's Axe or other Ruler Reaction items before engagement. Use Stasis to skip its reaction turn. Prioritize breaking the Bind. Freeze is debilitating — spread out. Use Bluescreen bombs + explosives.

name: Berserker Queen
description: Alien Ruler — a massive, enraged Berserker that reacts to every XCOM action.
rulerReactionNote: After each XCOM action, the Berserker Queen takes a free reaction: charge, attack, or move. Hunter's Axe and similar items prevent her reaction for that action.

abilities.name: Rampage
abilities.description: After being damaged, immediately charges the attacker and attacks if adjacent.

abilities.name: Shockwave
abilities.description: Slams the ground, knocking back and damaging all nearby soldiers.

abilities.name: Ruler Reaction
abilities.description: Reacts after each XCOM action.

counterTip: Never bunch up. Use Stasis and Psi Stasis to neutralize her reaction turns. Explosive weapons (plasma grenades) + AP rounds. SPARK with Haywire Protocol can lock her down temporarily.

name: Archon King
description: Alien Ruler — an ascended Archon with devastating area attacks and ruler reactions.
rulerReactionNote: After each XCOM action, the Archon King takes a free reaction: fly, attack, or use Blazing Pinions (charge is faster with fewer turns). Hunter's Axe prevents the reaction.

abilities.name: Blazing Pinions
abilities.description: Charges for one action then fires a devastating area barrage the next — in Ruler form, this can trigger much more often.

abilities.name: Fly
abilities.description: Highly mobile, can reposition anywhere each reaction.

abilities.name: Ruler Reaction
abilities.description: Reacts after each XCOM action.

counterTip: Use the Ruler Reaction items. Try to stasis it during Blazing Pinions wind-up. High-aim soldiers for consistent damage through elevation. Avoid overwatch vs. a flying ruler.

name: The Lost
description: WotC: Zombie-like former civilians. Attack in huge swarms. Any kill on a Lost grants a bonus action (free action, no ammo use).

abilities.name: Headshot
abilities.description: Only a headshot (one-hit kill) grants the free action bonus. Multiple hits that chip them down grants nothing.

abilities.name: Swarm
abilities.description: Arrive in large numbers, often 10–20+ per encounter. Overwhelm by sheer volume.

counterTip: Always headshot — don't chip them. Pistols and precise single-shot weapons are ideal. Lost and ADVENT will also fight each other — use this! Grenades kill groups but waste the free action chain.

name: Spectre
description: WotC: Psionic alien that can create shadow copies of your soldiers and turn them against you.

abilities.name: Shadowbind
abilities.description: Creates a shadow clone of a soldier that fights against XCOM. The bound soldier cannot act while the clone lives.

abilities.name: Cloak
abilities.description: Can conceal itself from XCOM soldiers.

counterTip: Kill the shadow clone or the Spectre to free the bound soldier. Psi Stasis on the Spectre prevents Shadowbind. Prioritize Spectre when it activates.

name: ADVENT Purifier
description: WotC: ADVENT unit armed with a flamethrower. Explodes violently on death.

abilities.name: Flamethrower
abilities.description: Cone fire attack that applies Burn status.

abilities.name: Death Explosion
abilities.description: Explodes on death — do not cluster soldiers near dying Purifiers.

counterTip: Kill from range. Never let it flank into your cluster. Kill with a shot that won't cause collateral explosion damage to your squad.

name: ADVENT Priest
description: WotC: ADVENT psionic support unit. Can shield itself, stasis your soldiers, and resurrect dead ADVENT.

abilities.name: Stasis Shield
abilities.description: Passively puts itself in stasis when near death — invulnerable for 1 turn, then continues fighting.

abilities.name: Sustain
abilities.description: Can passively survive a lethal hit once.

abilities.name: Null Lance
abilities.description: Fires a psionic beam at a soldier.

counterTip: Kill quickly before Stasis Shield triggers — or use abilities that bypass it. Psi Stasis your soldier after they get Null Lanced to prevent further effects.

name: The Assassin
description: WotC Chosen: A stealth-based melee Chosen. Excels in close combat and can attack from concealment.

abilities.name: Concealment
abilities.description: Can cloak and attack from stealth, ignoring overwatch.

abilities.name: Annihilate
abilities.description: High damage melee attack.

abilities.name: Shadow Form
abilities.description: When badly damaged, retreats and becomes temporarily invulnerable.

abilities.name: Kidnap
abilities.description: Can grab and remove a soldier from play (they must be rescued).

counterTip: Scanning Protocol reveals her concealment. Bladestorm Rangers punish her melee. Keep your squad spread so Annihilate can't chain. Learn her weaknesses to gain advantage.

name: The Hunter
description: WotC Chosen: Long-range sniper Chosen. Uses powerful shots and suppression to lock down your squad.

abilities.name: Suppression
abilities.description: Suppresses a target, reducing aim and granting a reaction shot.

abilities.name: Chain Shot
abilities.description: Fires multiple times at the same target.

abilities.name: Rapid Fire
abilities.description: Two shots at cost of one action (minus aim).

abilities.name: Shadow Form
abilities.description: Withdraws when badly damaged.

counterTip: Smoke grenades and smashing his cover forces repositioning. Close the gap — he's weak in close quarters. Learn his weaknesses to deal bonus damage.

name: The Warlock
description: WotC Chosen: Psionic Chosen. Can summon spectral army, mind control soldiers, and blast with psi powers.

abilities.name: Spectral Army
abilities.description: Summons Spectre soldiers that fight for him. Must be cleared before focusing the Warlock.

abilities.name: Mind Control
abilities.description: Attempts to control a soldier.

abilities.name: Psi Storm
abilities.description: Massive area psionic damage.

abilities.name: Shadow Form
abilities.description: Withdraws when badly damaged.

counterTip: Psi Operative Solace aura protects from mind control. Kill the Spectral Army first or they'll drain your actions. Flashbangs Disorient him, stopping psi powers for a turn.
